title: Idea: Dashboard countdown widget option to calculate by workdays
excerpt:
I’m a relatively new user of Monday, building a personal dashboard to keep tabs on my project and task portfolio. 
I would like to display a countdown widget of work days remaining until our team goes on holiday break (e…

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a relatively new user of Monday, building a personal dashboard to keep tabs on my project and task portfolio.

I would like to display a countdown widget of work days remaining until our team goes on holiday break (eg Thanksgiving and Christmas in my area).

It would be nice if the widget could allow me to countdown by remaining work days as defined in the system settings.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Parke!

You could set up a formula to calculate the amount of days from the current date until your holiday date. As each day passes, it will adjust the countdown:


Screen Shot 2022-11-15 at 10.07.06 am774×352 18 KB

And then utilise the numbers widget in a dashboard to display the numbers in a countdown:

As each day passes, it will adjust the countdown.

Is this something along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank You!

I’ll definitely consider that.

I’m not sure yet if I want to add to my rows (placeholder for general holidays) and columns, but I’ll keep it in mind as a backup.
